title: Website Cost in Pune 2026: Pricing Guide | Growthik
description: How much does a website cost in Pune in 2026? Compare pricing for basic sites, eCommerce, custom apps and key cost factors.

faqs.question: What is the average website cost in Pune?
faqs.answer: The cost ranges significantly: basic informational sites run ₹8,000–₹35,000, professional business sites cost ₹35,000–₹1,50,000 and complex eCommerce sites start around ₹80,000 to over ₹5,00,000.

faqs.question: Why are some web design quotes so cheap?
faqs.answer: Extremely cheap quotes usually mean the developer is using a pre-made, bloated template, providing no SEO optimization, zero custom design and limited post-launch support.

faqs.question: What features increase the cost of a website?
faqs.answer: Costs increase with custom UI/UX design, advanced functionality (like user portals or booking systems), eCommerce capabilities, complex animations and deep SEO integration.

faqs.question: Are domain and hosting included in the website cost?
faqs.answer: Usually, the first year is included, but domain and hosting are recurring annual expenses (ranging from ₹3,000 to ₹30,000+ depending on the server quality).

faqs.question: Why should I pay more for a custom-coded website?
faqs.answer: Custom-coded websites (like those built with Next.js) offer vastly superior loading speeds, better security, complete design flexibility and significantly higher SEO potential compared to basic builders.

faqs.question: What is the difference between a ₹15,000 and a ₹1,00,000 website?
faqs.answer: A ₹15k site is a digital brochure. A ₹1L site is a marketing asset with conversion-optimized copywriting, custom branding, technical SEO, fast load times and a scalable architecture.

faqs.question: How much does an eCommerce website cost in Pune?
faqs.answer: A robust eCommerce website starts around ₹80,000 and can scale upwards of ₹5,00,000 depending on the number of products, payment gateways, ERP integrations and inventory complexity.

faqs.question: What is website maintenance and how much does it cost?
faqs.answer: Maintenance includes security patches, plugin updates, backups and minor content edits. It typically costs between ₹5,000 and ₹25,000 per month.

faqs.question: Does the cost include SEO?
faqs.answer: Basic on-page SEO is usually included in professional packages, but comprehensive, ongoing SEO campaigns to rank for competitive keywords are billed separately as a monthly retainer.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade a cheap website later?
faqs.answer: Often, it's more expensive to fix or upgrade a poorly built, cheap website than it is to build a high-quality site from scratch due to technical debt and bad architecture.

faqs.question: How do I ensure I get ROI on my website investment?
faqs.answer: Focus on value, not just cost. Invest in a site that has strong technical SEO, compelling copywriting and clear calls-to-action so it functions as a 24/7 lead generation tool.

faqs.question: Does Growthik Media provide transparent pricing?
faqs.answer: Yes, Growthik Media provides detailed, itemized proposals outlining exactly what you are paying for, including design, development, SEO and ongoing maintenance.

sections.heading: Why Website Development Cost in Pune Varies So Much
sections.content: One of the most common questions Pune founders ask is: 'How much does a website cost in Pune?' In this guide, we break down website pricing for local businesses, eCommerce brands and B2B companies so you can budget for a site that actually generates enquiries.Why Website Development Cost in Pune Varies So MuchA website's cost depends on your specific goals, the number of pages, complexity of features, design requirements and who you hire to build it.Basic Informational Website (₹8,000 – ₹35,000)A basic website typically includes 5–10 pages: Home, About, Services, Blog and Contact. These are built on WordPress or a website builder.Good for: Consultants, clinics, local shopsTimeline: 1–3 weeksIncludes: Responsive design, basic SEO setup, contact formBusiness / Corporate Website (₹35,000 – ₹1,50,000)A professional business website with custom design, performance optimization, on-page SEO and features like team pages, case studies, and blogs.eCommerce Website (₹80,000 – ₹5,00,000+)An eCommerce site requires a product catalog, shopping cart, payment gateway integration (Razorpay, PayU, Stripe), inventory management, and order tracking.Cost is what you pay. Value is what you get. A ₹15,000 website that generates zero leads has cost you more than a ₹1,50,000 website generating 50 leads per month.Hidden Costs to Budget ForDomain registration: ₹800–₹2,000/yearHosting: ₹3,000–₹30,000/yearSSL certificate: Free to ₹15,000/yearWebsite maintenance: ₹5,000–₹25,000/month
